name: Renal Incidentaloma
description: Report template for incidental renal lesions identified on imaging performed for other indications

findings.technique: CT [abdomen/chest/CTA] performed for [other clinical indication]. Renal protocol images [performed/not performed].
findings.comparison: No prior renal imaging available for comparison. [Prior imaging from X date reviewed] - [lesion is new/stable/interval change].

sections.name: Renal Lesion
sections.content: Incidental renal [mass/cyst/nodule] identified in [right/left] kidney. Size: [X]cm. Location: [upper/mid/lower] pole or interpolar. Exophytic: [yes/no].

sections.name: Characterization
sections.content: Attenuation: [X]HU (pre-contrast). [Cystic (simple/complex) / Solid / Mixed]. For cystic lesions: Bosniak category: [I / II / IIF / III / IV].

sections.name: Solid Lesion Features
sections.content: Margin: [well-defined / irregular / infiltrative]. Enhancement: [none / mild / moderate / marked] (~[X]HU post-contrast). Necrosis: [present/absent]. Calcifications: [present/absent].

sections.name: Additional Findings
sections.content: Additional renal lesions: [present/absent]. [Contralateral kidney: unremarkable / contains lesion]. [Collecting system: uninvolved / involved]. [Renal vein: patent / tumor thrombus]. [Perinephric stranding: present/absent].

impression:
1. Incidental renal [mass/cyst] in [right/left] kidney measuring [X]cm
2. [Cystic lesion: Bosniak category X / Solid lesion] - [likely benign (benign cyst/angiomyolipoma) / indeterminate / concerning for renal cell carcinoma]
3. [Follow-up in 3-6 months / MRI / Biopsy / Surgical consultation] recommended
4. [No evidence of venous thrombosis / Renal vein thrombosis present] if applicable
author: RadReport Templates
